title: Feasibility, Alternatives, Risk Experiments, and Stop Decisions · Evidence Triage
summary: A preserved decision record for feasibility, alternatives, risk experiments, and stop decisions contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in feasibility proof and alternative decision record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.
Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory
steps.instruction:
debug case — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.

Inspect the Constraint Inventory trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory, keep Constraint Inventory connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Constraint Inventory, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Constraint Inventory precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Constraint Inventory, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Motivation can compensate for every missing project dependency.

stimulus.title: Constraint Inventory case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Motivation can compensate for every missing project dependency.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners. Artifact under review: feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Constraint Inventory, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a capstone-stop-pivot-evidence-c9w1e7: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Stop Pivot Evidence into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence, keep Stop Pivot Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.code:
capstone-stop-pivot-evidence-c9w1e7:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Stop Pivot Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.

For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Persistence despite disconfirming evidence demonstrates capstone excellence.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Stop Pivot Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Stop Pivot Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.
